# jellyfin_plugin (Data Source)

Looks up an installed Jellyfin plugin by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_plugin" "bookshelf" {
  name = "Bookshelf"
}

output "bookshelf_version" {
  value = data.jellyfin_plugin.bookshelf.version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The plugin name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The plugin description.
- `id` (String) The plugin ID.
- `status` (String) The plugin status (e.g., `Active`, `Disabled`).
- `version` (String) The installed plugin version.
